summary: Geumcheon is southern-industrial with a historically progressive working-class base. 최기상 won 59.03% — one of the clearer DPK margins south of the river. Manufacturing legacy and immigrant-adjacent demographics anchor reliable progressive vote.

issues.label: Working-class industrial base
issues.description: Manufacturing workforce history aligns with labor-adjacent progressive politics.

issues.label: Progressive identity
issues.description: Consistent DPK representation across recent cycles.

issues.label: Lower-income and multicultural neighborhoods
issues.description: Demographic composition differs from central/northern Seoul.
